Projects i have worked on

Here are some of the projects i have worked on for both of my personal and professional experience as a Flutter Developer.

A.C.E. - Ace Dating & Friends

A.C.E. is for asexual dating and finding ace friends

Prosperna Mobile

A mobile app for Prosperna - an all-in-one e-commerce platform for Philippine MSMEs

Cebuana Lhuillier Jewelry

E-commerce Web App for Cebuana Lhuillier Jewelry

Cebuana Alajera

E-commerce Web App for Cebuana Alajera

Timberland Mountain Bike Park

A booking mobile app for Timberland Mountain Bike Park

ActNow Mobile

A mobile app that rewards you for saving the planet through eco-friendly actions

A11Y

An app that allows people with disabilities to watch movies with accessibility features

NVTours

A tourist app for tourists in Nueva Vizcaya with local guides and recommendations

View on GitHub

QCU Mobile

An e-commerce app for the students of Quezon City University

View on GitHub

PharmaGo

A pharmacy delivery app for PharmaGo

View on GitHub

GAIA

An information app for gardening at your own home with plant care guides

View on GitHub

My Achievements

Here are some of my achievements in my career as a Flutter Developer

Flutter Workshop Speaker for GDG On Campus La Salle

Conducted a workshop on Flutter for the GDG On Campus La Salle where I shared my knowledge in utilizing Flutter to the participants.

2025

FlutterFlow Speaker for G-TECH SUMMIT 2025

Did a talk at G-TECH Summit 2025 hosted by GDG on Campus TUP where I shared an introduction on how we can leverage FlutterFlow in building cross-platform applications with ease.

2025

Mobile Development Mentor for INNOLYMPICS 2024

Guided and provided insights to teams on how they can leverage new technologies in building mobile apps during the Innolympics 2025 hosted by GDSC PLM.

2024

Workshop Speaker for INNOLYMPICS 2024

Acted as a speaker in a workshop where I shared my knowledge in utilizing Flutter to the participants of Innolympics 2025 hosted by GDSC PLM.

2024

FFDG Hackfest: Impact Challenge 4th place

Participated in FFDG Manila's Hackfest: Impact Challenge 2024, placing 4th with the Rent 'n Lend App my team developed.

2024

Guest Speaker for Flutter PH

Showcased a project on helping farmers via mobile app at a Flutter PH event.

2023
